data.description: BUILDPLAN M4 / WS-13b (BUILDPLAN id MA-20). scripts/record-cassettes.ts plus npm run record plus a README operator-flow section (GEMINI_API_KEY usage, expected small spend, file list of about 5 cassettes). Enables AC-28, which the operator proves at the human-track ticket. Depends: MA-19. Size S.
data.title: Cassette recording script and operator flow docs

data.body:
SELF-REVIEW VERDICT: APPROVE (own-reviewer protocol; installed lattice CLI has no code-review command)

Scope of diff (0f63c45 vs origin/main, 5 files, +434/-11, all inside falcon-detective/):
- scripts/record-cassettes.ts (new): in-process GEMINI_MODE=record pipeline runner; --dry-run enumerates plan (handler/model/prompt source/schema/output keying) with zero network; keyless invocation fails fast (exit 1) with operator-facing message BEFORE any preflight/pipeline work; preflight reuses WS-1 dirtyPaths + binary check; before/after cassette-dir diff reports created/updated/stale.
- package.json: scripts only (record added; build -> tsc -p tsconfig.build.json). No dependency changes (MA-19 ownership respected).
- tsconfig.json/tsconfig.build.json: split so npx tsc --noEmit covers scripts/ while dist/cli.js emit layout is byte-identical (verified: dist/cli.js present, no dist/scripts).
- README.md: only the re-record section rewritten (N-6 compliant) — GEMINI_API_KEY usage, spend estimate (~5 calls: 3x pro + 2x flash), 5-cassette file list with roles, verify+commit steps.

Checks performed:
- Gates green post-rebase onto origin/main (PR #46 merged mid-task; clean rebase, drift re-verified): npm ci OK; npm test 136/136; npx tsc --noEmit clean; biome check clean (57 files); npm run build layout unchanged; dry-run + keyless fail-fast demonstrated.
- Drift guard proven live: after the rebase pulled in MA-12's makeProposeFixHandler factory, the guard correctly failed (3 templates unaccounted); scan extended to the promptFile: spec shape and re-verified.
- G-1: falcon-agent untouched. fixtures/cassettes/ untouched (git status clean). No live API call was made (AC-28 execution reserved for operator at MA-24).

Residual risks (accepted): drift guard is textual (documented fail-loud fallback); spend estimate is an order-of-magnitude claim, guarded by the at-most-3x schema-retry bound.

PR open: https://github.com/mrojas54/maltese-agent/pull/57 (head 0f63c45, base main). Note: parent PR #46 merged to main mid-task; branch was rebased onto origin/main, so #57 is no longer stacked — its diff is final.

OPERATOR COMMAND SEQUENCE for MA-24 / MA-H-1 (the human re-record; ~5 live Gemini calls, expected spend cents — also in falcon-detective/README.md 'Re-recording cassettes (operator flow)'):

  # 0. From the repo root, on a checkout where falcon-agent/ has NO uncommitted changes
  cargo build -p falcon-mcp

  # 1. Setup
  cd falcon-detective
  npm ci

  # 2. Sanity-check the plan — zero network, no key needed
  npm run record -- --dry-run

  # 3. Record (the only step that spends money; ~5 calls: 3x gemini-2.5-pro + 2x gemini-2.5-flash)
  GEMINI_API_KEY=<key from https://aistudio.google.com/apikey> npm run record

  # 4. Verify offline replay (e2e in cassette mode) — must pass on the NEW cassettes
  npm run test:full -- tests/e2e.test.ts

  # 5. Commit the cassettes; delete any files the run reported as stale leftovers
  git add fixtures/cassettes/
  git commit -m 'chore(falcon-detective): re-record cassettes against @google/genai 2.x (MA-24, AC-28)'

  # 6. Cleanup the per-run worktree the pipeline created (name printed by the script)
  git -C .. worktree remove --force .runs/<run-name>

The script fails fast with instructions if the key is missing, falcon-agent/ is dirty, or falcon-mcp is not built. After MA-24 lands, MA-22 flips E2E_REQUIRED to 1 in ci.yml per the parked note.

provenance.reason: PR #57 merge conflicts vs main after #56/#58 landed
rebased onto main, conflicts resolved as union, gates green

data.body:
CONFLICT-RESOLUTION ROUNDTRIP complete. PR #57 rebased onto origin/main (now includes #56/MA-26 and #58/MA-15); new head SHA 432e71adac59772a95d923abb017f1741e9d1200, force-with-lease push verified, PR reports MERGEABLE (CI in progress).

Conflicted files + resolution (union, existing/#56 first, MA-20 after):
- package.json: kept #56's e2e:fingerprint script AND MA-20's record script + build->tsconfig.build.json repoint.
- README.md: kept the MA-20 operator-flow structure; #56's fingerprint manifest step integrated as new step 4 ('Write the e2e fingerprint manifest', full manifest explanation preserved), verify+commit renumbered to step 5.

Coherence reconciliation (per orchestrator step 3):
- record-cassettes.ts next-steps now print record -> e2e:fingerprint -> test:full -> commit -> worktree cleanup.
- write-e2e-fingerprint.ts header comment updated from the old 'npm run fix' record flow to 'npm run record'.
- record-cassettes.ts cassette listing now excludes dotfiles so .e2e-fingerprint.json is never misreported as a cassette.
- Bonus interaction: MA-20's tsconfig split brings #56's scripts/write-e2e-fingerprint.ts into npx tsc --noEmit scope (it was unchecked on main); it typechecks clean.

UPDATED OPERATOR SEQUENCE for MA-24 (supersedes my earlier comment — adds the mandatory fingerprint step; without it the e2e treats cassettes as stale):
  cargo build -p falcon-mcp        # repo root, falcon-agent/ clean
  cd falcon-detective && npm ci
  npm run record -- --dry-run      # sanity, zero network
  GEMINI_API_KEY=<key> npm run record
  npm run e2e:fingerprint          # writes fixtures/cassettes/.e2e-fingerprint.json
  npm run test:full -- tests/e2e.test.ts
  git add fixtures/cassettes/      # cassettes + manifest
  git commit -m 'chore(falcon-detective): re-record cassettes (MA-24, AC-28)'
  git -C .. worktree remove --force .runs/<run-name>

Gates post-rebase: npm ci OK; npm test 146/146 (24 files); npx tsc --noEmit clean (both scripts in scope); biome clean (59 files); npm run build dist layout unchanged; dry-run zero-network verified; fixtures/cassettes/ and falcon-agent/ untouched (G-1).

Merged (PR #57, operator-authorized). Recording script + npm run record + reconciled operator flow (record → e2e:fingerprint → test:full); union conflict resolution vs #56 verified by 146/146 on the assembled tree. Enables AC-28 (operator proves at MA-24).
